prestazioni: Engine swap to 2GR-FKS 3.5L V6 (from Lexus GS F) with forged internals (Manley H-beam connecting rods, JE 12.5:1 pistons) and ported/polished cylinder heads by HKS, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust by Tomei (with 50mm wastegate dump tubes).

Full bolt-on forced induction kit by GReddy (including 80mm MAF, 76mm throttle body, and front-mount intercooler with 1,200cfm core) mated to a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom flex-fuel mapping for E85 compatibility, supporting 550whp on pump gas (700whp on E85).

Chassis reinforcement via Cusco 4-point bolt-in roll cage (with integrated strut tower braces) and full polybushings (SuperPro 62mm front control arm bushings, Whiteline rear subframe bushings) paired with KW Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable damping, 20mm drop) and StopTech Trophy BBK (380mm rotors, 6-piston calipers) with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (custom-fitted for Avalon with 30mm extended fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and duckbill rear wing) painted in Toyota 'Burnt Orange Metallic' with matte black accents and custom vinyl overlays by Avery Dennison (gloss carbon fiber weave on hood and roof).

OEM+ front bumper lip by Varis (with integrated LED fog light deletes and custom tow hooks) paired with a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser (modeled after the Lexus LC500) and side skirts by Seibon Carbon (pre-preg autoclave carbon fiber).

Wheel setup: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (19x10.5 +25 front, 19x11.5 +35 rear) with custom center caps (Toyota emblem in red) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 305/30/19 rear), paired with custom titanium wheel studs by ARP (12x1.5, 50mm length).
